title: Breaking Up Forms into different sections
excerpt:

posts.author: mikeweiss (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you know how to embed form fields in a way that you can split up the field across different segments on the page and unite the submission with a single button?
I know how to get the embed form in, I just don’t know how to split them up, remove the submit buttons and have them all submit at the same time with one CTA.

Ultimately I want it to look like the attached image where there are different blocks that are for specific columns from monday.com while removing the submit button that comes from creating a different form for each and only having 1 submit button that pulls in all of the data submitted on that page in each block.

Hopefully that makes sense

No Limit Creatives1920×2733 233 KB

posts.author: cherylbenke (Cheryl Benkert)
posts.cookedHtml: @mikeweiss, I have been using Google Forms to do something similar.

posts.author: cdeberry (Cheryl DeBerry)
posts.cookedHtml: @cherylbenke Do you have a google form sending data directly into a board in Monday.com? If so, do you mind sharing which app/integration are you using for that? Thanks!

posts.author: apeers (Amanda Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: Following this as well. Anyone figure this out?
